articles.description: Raja Raghuvanshi's brother, Vipin Raghuvanshi, reportedly welcomed a baby boy on Sunday. The family hailed it as a divine sign: “God has sent Raja back to us.”

articles.description: Sonam Raghuvanshi, 24, was arrested for her suspected role in the murder of her husband during their honeymoon in Meghalaya, just days after their wedding.

articles.description: Ashwini Bhide will become the first woman to head the BMC. The anticipated transition comes as current municipal commissioner Bhushan Gagrani retires.

topStories.title: Quote of the day by Abraham Lincoln: ‘The best way to predict your future is…’
topStories.description: Abraham Lincoln, a pivotal figure in American history, rose from humble beginnings to become 16th President. His leadership during the Civil War and commitment to abolishing slavery left a lasting legacy of resilience and justice, emphasising the importance of active effort in shaping the future.

topStories.title: Wall Street rally ahead? Dow futures jump nearly 500 points on Trump’s reported plans to exit Iran war
topStories.description: US stock futures surged after reports suggested Donald Trump may seek to end the Iran conflict, easing investor concerns over prolonged geopolitical tensions. Gains in Dow, Nasdaq and S&P futures come amid stable oil prices and falling bond yields, although uncertainty remains due to ongoing risks in the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump shares renderings of his presidential library — a massive skyscraper in Miami
dailyNews.description: The mocked-up library dwarfs the nearby Freedom Tower, a downtown Miami landmark.

dailyNews.title: WH pressed on Trump’s threat to hit civilian infrastructure in Iran
dailyNews.description: In a post on Truth Social, President Donald Trump threatened the destruction of Iran's civilian energy and water infrastructure if a deal to end the war and reopen the crucial Strait of Hormuz is not reached soon. NBC News' Garrett Haake questioned White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt about the president's threat.
